title: Single-pass numerically-stable streaming covariance
source: Online single-pass mean/variance/covariance/correlation over an (x,y) stream. Intended solution uses numerically stable Welford + co-moment updates; the naive E[x^2]-E[x]^2 / E[xy]-E[x]E[y] formulas catastrophically cancel on large-offset data. Ground truth: numpy var/cov computed on de-meaned (small-magnitude) reference arrays.
